objectives.name: Game database availability
objectives.description: A bounded read-only query reaches the live Dune schema.

objectives.name: Control-plane availability
objectives.description: Postgres, Director, Gateway, both RabbitMQ brokers, and TextRouter are running.

objectives.name: Required-map availability
objectives.description: Every always-on map has an alive, ready, active farm registration.

objectives.name: Backup recovery point
objectives.description: The newest recognized PostgreSQL dump remains inside the configured RPO.

objectives.name: Verified restore proof
objectives.description: A recent hash-valid isolated restore receipt passed integrity and RTO policy.

objectives.name: Host memory headroom
objectives.description: MemAvailable remains above the configured operational floor.

objectives.name: Admin authentication posture
objectives.description: Token authentication is required and a non-placeholder credential source is configured.
